description: Create a 'Scrum Dashboard' in TiddlyWiki to automate daily standup documentation. The dashboard requires a 'Standup Template' tiddler containing the headers '! Yesterday', '! Today', and '! Blockers'. Implement a button on the 'Scrum Dashboard' labeled 'Create Today's Standup' that generates a new tiddler titled 'YYYY-0MM-0DD - Daily Standup', tagged 'Standup', and populated with the template content. The dashboard must also display a dynamic list of all tiddlers tagged 'Standup'. Use the functional dashboard to generate today's note and record 'Configured the automated standup generator.' in the Today section.
